Package minicp.engine.core

Class MiniCP

java.lang.Object
minicp.engine.core.MiniCP

Solver
public class MiniCP extends Object implements Solver

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    fixPoint()
    Computes the fix-point with all the scheduled constraints.
    StateManager
    getStateManager()
    Returns the state manager in charge of the global state of the solver.
    Objective
    maximize(IntVar x)
    Creates a maximization objective on the given variable.
    Objective
    minimize(IntVar x)
    Creates a minimization objective on the given variable.
    void
    onFixPoint(Procedure listener)
    Adds a listener called whenever the fix-point.
    void
    post(BoolVar b)
    Forces the boolean variable to be true and then computes the fix-point.
    void
    post(Constraint c)
    Posts the constraint, that is call Constraint.post() and computes the fix-point.
    void
    post(Constraint c, boolean enforceFixPoint)
    Posts the constraint that is call Constraint.post() and optionally computes the fix-point.
    void
    schedule(Constraint c)
    Schedules the constraint to be propagated by the fix-point.

      public StateManager getStateManager()

      Returns the state manager in charge of the global state of the solver.

    • schedule

      public void schedule(Constraint c)
      Description copied from interface: Solver
      Schedules the constraint to be propagated by the fix-point.
      Specified by:
      schedule in interface Solver
      Parameters:
      c - the constraint to be scheduled

    • onFixPoint

      public void onFixPoint(Procedure listener)
      Description copied from interface: Solver
      Adds a listener called whenever the fix-point.
      Specified by:
      onFixPoint in interface Solver
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener that is called whenever the fix-point is started

      Description copied from interface: Solver
      Computes the fix-point with all the scheduled constraints.

    • minimize

      public Objective minimize(IntVar x)
      Description copied from interface: Solver
      Creates a minimization objective on the given variable.
      Specified by:
      minimize in interface Solver
      Parameters:
      x - the variable to minimize
      Returns:
      an objective that can minimize x

    • maximize

      public Objective maximize(IntVar x)
      Description copied from interface: Solver
      Creates a maximization objective on the given variable.
      Specified by:
      maximize in interface Solver
      Parameters:
      x - the variable to maximize
      Returns:
      an objective that can maximize x
      See Also:
      • DFSearch.optimize(Objective)

    • post

      public void post(Constraint c)
      Description copied from interface: Solver
      Posts the constraint, that is call Constraint.post() and computes the fix-point. A InconsistencyException is thrown if by posting the constraint it is proven that there is no solution.
      Specified by:
      post in interface Solver
      Parameters:
      c - the constraint to be posted

    • post

      public void post(Constraint c, boolean enforceFixPoint)
      Description copied from interface: Solver
      Posts the constraint that is call Constraint.post() and optionally computes the fix-point. A InconsistencyException is thrown if by posting the constraint it is proven that there is no solution.
      Specified by:
      post in interface Solver
      Parameters:
      c - the constraint to be posted
      enforceFixPoint - is one wants to compute the fix-point after

    • post

      public void post(BoolVar b)
      Description copied from interface: Solver
      Forces the boolean variable to be true and then computes the fix-point.
      Specified by:
      post in interface Solver
      Parameters:
      b - the variable that must be set to true
